name: Greg Cohen
abstract: Greg Cohen (born July 13, 1953) is an American jazz bassist who has been a member of John Zorn's Masada quartet and worked with numerous other noted musicians for over four decades.

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: And so between me and Greg, we did most of Kenny’s gigs in the last couple of years. I loved playing with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe. Utica, New York, November 6, 2010 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Grosz
about_quotes.evidence: I like Greg. Greg Cohen’s wonderful because he plays acoustic bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Grosz interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 4, 1995
